name: stock_ticker
description: Live stock price ticker with daily change (requires Finnhub API key in config)
css: .stock-ticker { height:100%; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; padding:0.8em; } .stock-ticker .ticker-title { font-size:clamp(0.6rem,3.2cqi,0.9rem); color:var(--fg-dim,#888); letter-spacing:0.2em; margin-bottom:0.5em; } .stock-ticker .ticker-message { color:var(--accent,#d7ff64); font-size:clamp(0.72rem,3.6cqi,1rem); line-height:1.25; margin-bottom:0.45em; } .stock-ticker .ticker-row { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:0.6em; padding:0.3em 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .stock-ticker .ticker-name { font-size:clamp(0.8rem,4cqi,1.1rem); color:var(--fg,#ccc); min-width:4em; font-weight:600; } .stock-ticker .ticker-price { font-size:clamp(0.8rem,4.4cqi,1.2rem); font-weight:700; color:var(--fg-bright,#fff); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; } .stock-ticker .ticker-change { font-size:clamp(0.7rem,3.6cqi,1rem); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; min-width:5em; text-align:right; }
